revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}; color: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="yes table-yes2 notheme"|{{#if:{{{color|}}}{{{c|}}}{{{text|}}}{{{t|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}|{{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}}} < 4.5|[[Category:Articles using unified table cell templates with invalid colour combination]]}}}}}}{{{1|{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}; color: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="yes table-yes2 notheme"|{{#if:{{{color|}}}{{{c|}}}{{{text|}}}{{{t|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}|{{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}}} < 4.5|[[Category:Articles using unified table cell templates with invalid colour combination]]}}}}}}{{{1|{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}; color: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="yes table-yes2 notheme"|{{#if:{{{color|}}}{{{c|}}}{{{text|}}}{{{t|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}|{{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}}} < 4.5|[[Category:Articles using unified table cell templates with invalid colour combination]]}}}}}}{{{1|{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}; color: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="yes table-yes2 notheme"|{{#if:{{{color|}}}{{{c|}}}{{{text|}}}{{{t|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}|{{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}}} < 4.5|[[Category:Articles using unified table cell templates with invalid colour combination]]}}}}}}{{{1|{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}; color: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="yes table-yes2 notheme"|{{#if:{{{color|}}}{{{c|}}}{{{text|}}}{{{t|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}|{{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}}} < 4.5|}}}}}}{{{1|{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Articles using unified table cell templates with invalid colour combination]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}; color: {{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="yes table-yes2 notheme"|{{#if:{{{color|}}}{{{c|}}}{{{text|}}}{{{t|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |won = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>9EFF9E}}}}}}
  |1|1st|gold = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFD700}}}}}}
  |2|2nd|silver = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>C0C0C0}}}}}}
  |3|3rd|bronze = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>E2B740}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>767676}}}}}}
  |honorary = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>CEF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{color|{{{c|<nowiki>#</nowiki>F8EABA}}}}}}
}}|{{
#switch: {{lc:{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}
  |platinum = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>FFF}}}}}}
  |#default = {{{text|{{{t|<nowiki>#</nowiki>000}}}}}}
}}}} < 4.5|}}}}}}{{{1|{{{place|{{{p|Won}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}

[[Category:Articles using unified table cell templates with invalid colour combination]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
